bug: Stale score-level APR could override live replay event APR during progressive simulation.
fix: Browser APR calculation now prioritizes live event money fields and event-level elapsed simulated time. In-progress events no longer fall back to totalDays()/180; score-level APR is only used when there is no live event.

live_browser_evidence.status_during_sample: Starting real 180-day ETH/USDC simulation in the AEGIS sandbox...

disk_note: Cleared rebuildable ~/Library/pnpm/store cache to restore write headroom for simulator artifacts.
